chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application Nos.59 to 62 of 2019 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.444/2019 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.445/2019 07.04.2026 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Aneel Zia, Advocate for the respondent a/w Ms. Saima Syed Advocate Pursuant to order dated 05.03.2026, learned counsel for the respondent states that it may be just and proper to set aside the impugned judgment and the matter be remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law expeditiously, preferably within ninety days. He further seeks that pending the foregoing, no coercive action be taken against the respondent arising herefrom. Learned counsel for the applicant articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that these references may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office to place a copy hereof in each connected references. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
